{
  "xenonPreset": 1,
  "exportedAt": "2026-07-13T20:52:22.954Z",
  "appVersion": "",
  "gridCols": 24,
  "kind": "theme",
  "name": "Demonic",
  "data": {
    "appearance": "dark",
    "styleMode": "glass",
    "retroScanlines": true,
    "accent": "#d7461e",
    "background": "#070808",
    "text": "#f0f3f1",
    "mutedText": null,
    "lineColor": null,
    "dynamicAlbumTheme": true,
    "panelAlpha": 0.4,
    "panelBorderStrength": 1,
    "panelShadowStrength": 0.7,
    "uiRoundness": 1.1,
    "glassBlur": 16,
    "glassSaturate": 160,
    "bgDim": 0.37,
    "bgBlur": 0,
    "bgAurora": {
      "enabled": true,
      "intensity": 55,
      "speed": 50
    },
    "bgGrid": {
      "enabled": true,
      "color": "#1ed760",
      "intensity": 45,
      "speed": 50
    },
    "bgStatic": {
      "style": "none",
      "intensity": 70
    },
    "bgCustom": {
      "enabled": true,
      "name": "",
      "code": "const particles = [];\nconst lightnings = []; \nlet initialized = false;\n\n// POZYCJE ŚWIATEŁ NA SZTYWNO (Dopasowane pod 2560 x 720)\nconst hellLights = [\n  { x: 1280, y: 220, size: 350, r: 255, g: 10, b: 0, intensity: 0.6, type: 'slow' }, // Pentagram\n  { x: 1400, y: 390, size: 70,  r: 255, g: 80, b: 0, intensity: 0.9, type: 'flicker' } // Kula w dłoni\n];\n\nfunction draw(ctx, t, w, h, assets) {\n  if (!initialized) {\n    // 1. Piekielne iskry (Embers)\n    for (let i = 0; i < 250; i++) {\n      particles.push({\n        type: 'ember',\n        baseX: Math.random() * w, \n        baseY: Math.random() * h,\n        size: Math.random() * 2.5 + 0.5,\n        speedY: Math.random() * 80 + 30,    \n        swaySpeed: Math.random() * 3 + 1,\n        swayAmp: Math.random() * 15 + 5,\n        offset: Math.random() * 1000\n      });\n    }\n\n    // 2. Mroczny popiół (Ash)\n    for (let i = 0; i < 100; i++) {\n      particles.push({\n        type: 'ash',\n        baseX: Math.random() * w,\n        baseY: Math.random() * h,\n        size: Math.random() * 3 + 1,\n        speedX: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 20, \n        speedY: Math.random() * 20 + 10, \n        offset: Math.random() * 100\n      });\n    }\n    initialized = true;\n  }\n\n  // --- GENERATOR BŁYSKAWIC ---\n  if (Math.random() < 0.015) {\n    let startX = w * 0.2 + Math.random() * (w * 0.6); \n    let startY = 0; \n    let path = [{x: startX, y: startY}];\n    \n    for(let j = 0; j < (Math.random() * 10 + 10); j++) {\n      startX += (Math.random() - 0.5) * 120; \n      startY += Math.random() * 60 + 20;     \n      path.push({x: startX, y: startY});\n    }\n    lightnings.push({ path: path, life: 1.0 }); \n  }\n\n  ctx.imageSmoothingEnabled = true;\n  ctx.imageSmoothingQuality = 'high';\n\n  // --- RYSOWANIE TŁA ---\n  if (assets && assets.bg && assets.bg.width > 0 && assets.bg.height > 0) {\n    const scale = Math.max(w / assets.bg.width, h / assets.bg.height);\n    const imgW = Math.ceil(assets.bg.width * scale);\n    const imgH = Math.ceil(assets.bg.height * scale);\n    const imgX = Math.floor((w - imgW) / 2);\n    const imgY = Math.floor((h - imgH) / 2);\n    ctx.drawImage(assets.bg, imgX, imgY, imgW, imgH);\n  } else {\n    ctx.fillStyle = \"#110000\"; \n    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);\n  }\n\n  // --- ANIMACJA BŁYSKAWIC I GLOBALNEGO BŁYSKU ---\n  ctx.save();\n  for(let i = lightnings.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n    let l = lightnings[i];\n    l.life -= 0.04; \n    \n    if (l.life <= 0) {\n      lightnings.splice(i, 1); \n      continue;\n    }\n    \n    ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'lighter';\n    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 0, 20, ${l.life * 0.08})`; \n    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);\n\n    ctx.globalAlpha = l.life;\n    ctx.beginPath();\n    ctx.moveTo(l.path[0].x, l.path[0].y);\n    for(let j = 1; j < l.path.length; j++) {\n      ctx.lineTo(l.path[j].x, l.path[j].y);\n    }\n    \n    ctx.lineCap = 'round';\n    ctx.lineJoin = 'miter';\n    ctx.lineWidth = 8;\n    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255, 0, 50, 0.6)';\n    ctx.shadowBlur = 30;\n    ctx.shadowColor = '#ff0000';\n    ctx.stroke();\n    \n    ctx.lineWidth = 2;\n    ctx.strokeStyle = '#ffcccc'; \n    ctx.shadowBlur = 0;\n    ctx.stroke();\n  }\n  ctx.restore();\n\n  // --- OŚWIETLENIE GŁÓWNE (PENTAGRAM I KULA OGNIA) ---\n  ctx.save();\n  ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'screen';\n  \n  hellLights.forEach((light, index) => {\n    const lx = Math.round(light.x);\n    const ly = Math.round(light.y);\n    let currentAlpha, currentRadius;\n\n    if (light.type === 'flicker') {\n      const flicker = Math.sin(t * 30 + index) * 0.15 + Math.sin(t * 45) * 0.1;\n      currentAlpha = Math.min(1.0, Math.max(0.2, light.intensity + flicker));\n      currentRadius = Math.max(1, Math.round(light.size * (1 + flicker * 0.5)));\n    } else {\n      const pulse = Math.sin(t * 2 + index) * 0.1;\n      currentAlpha = Math.min(1.0, Math.max(0.1, light.intensity + pulse));\n      currentRadius = Math.max(1, Math.round(light.size * (1 + pulse * 0.1)));\n    }\n\n    const glow = ctx.createRadialGradient(lx, ly, 0, lx, ly, currentRadius);\n    glow.addColorStop(0,   `rgba(${light.r}, ${light.g}, ${light.b}, ${currentAlpha})`);          \n    glow.addColorStop(0.1, `rgba(${light.r}, ${Math.max(0, light.g - 20)}, ${light.b}, ${currentAlpha * 0.8})`);    \n    glow.addColorStop(0.3, `rgba(${light.r}, ${Math.max(0, light.g - 50)}, ${light.b}, ${currentAlpha * 0.4})`);      \n    glow.addColorStop(0.5, `rgba(${light.r}, 0, 0, ${currentAlpha * 0.15})`);\n    glow.addColorStop(0.7, `rgba(${light.r}, 0, 0, ${currentAlpha * 0.05})`); \n    glow.addColorStop(0.9, `rgba(${light.r}, 0, 0, ${currentAlpha * 0.01})`); \n    glow.addColorStop(1,   `rgba(${light.r}, 0, 0, 0)`); \n\n    ctx.fillStyle = glow;\n    const rectSize = currentRadius * 2 + 10;\n    ctx.fillRect(lx - currentRadius - 5, ly - currentRadius - 5, rectSize, rectSize);\n  });\n  ctx.restore();\n\n  // --- EFEKT LAWY (Z DOŁU) ---\n  ctx.save();\n  ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'screen';\n  const lavaPulse = Math.sin(t * 1.5) * 0.05 + 0.15;\n  const lavaGlow = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, h, 0, h * 0.6); \n  lavaGlow.addColorStop(0, `rgba(255, 60, 0, ${lavaPulse + 0.2})`); \n  lavaGlow.addColorStop(0.5, `rgba(255, 0, 0, ${lavaPulse * 0.5})`); \n  lavaGlow.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(255, 0, 0, 0)');\n  ctx.fillStyle = lavaGlow;\n  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);\n  ctx.restore();\n\n  // --- MROCZNA WINIETA ---\n  const vignette = ctx.createRadialGradient(w/2, h/2, h * 0.3, w/2, h/2, w * 0.6);\n  vignette.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(0,0,0,0)');\n  vignette.addColorStop(0.6, 'rgba(15,0,0,0.4)'); \n  vignette.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(5,0,0,0.85)'); \n  ctx.fillStyle = vignette;\n  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);\n\n  // --- ANIMACJA CZĄSTECZEK (ISKRY I POPIÓŁ) ---\n  particles.forEach(p => {\n    ctx.save();\n\n    if (p.type === 'ember') {\n      p.y = h + 20 - ((t * p.speedY + p.offset) % (h + 40));\n      p.x = p.baseX + Math.sin(t * p.swaySpeed + p.offset) * p.swayAmp;\n\n      const heightProgress = Math.max(0, p.y / h); \n      const flicker = (Math.sin(t * 15 + p.offset) * 0.5 + 0.5);\n      const alpha = Math.min(1.0, Math.max(0.0, heightProgress * flicker));\n\n      ctx.translate(p.x, p.y);\n      ctx.globalAlpha = alpha;\n      ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'screen';\n      \n      const isHot = Math.sin(t * 5 + p.offset) > 0;\n      ctx.fillStyle = isHot ? '#ffcc00' : '#ff3300';\n      \n      ctx.beginPath();\n      ctx.arc(0, 0, p.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n      ctx.fill();\n\n      ctx.shadowBlur = 10;\n      ctx.shadowColor = '#ff3300';\n      ctx.fill();\n\n    } else if (p.type === 'ash') {\n      p.y = -20 + ((t * p.speedY + p.offset) % (h + 40));\n      p.x = p.baseX + t * p.speedX + Math.sin(t * 2 + p.offset) * 10;\n      p.x = ((p.x % w) + w) % w;\n\n      const alpha = (Math.sin(t * 3 + p.offset) * 0.3 + 0.3);\n      \n      ctx.translate(p.x, p.y);\n      ctx.globalAlpha = alpha;\n      ctx.fillStyle = '#0a0000'; \n      \n      ctx.rotate(t * 2 + p.offset);\n      ctx.beginPath();\n      ctx.moveTo(0, -p.size);\n      ctx.lineTo(p.size, 0);\n      ctx.lineTo(0, p.size);\n      ctx.lineTo(-p.size, 0);\n      ctx.fill();\n    }\n    \n    ctx.restore();\n  });\n}",
      "assets": {
        "bg": "data:image/jpeg;base64,"
      }
    }
  }
}
